title: Training Journal of Ser Gallen, the Old Guard
source: A leather-bound notebook found in an abandoned watchtower outside Harmonia.
pages: Day 2,114. The boy today drew the sword wrong. I corrected the grip. He bled a little, but he will remember. Pain is the teacher who does not lie.
Day 2,117. I was informed today that I have been retired. The kingdom uses new methods. I do not understand the new methods. I asked what I was meant to do. They said: continue. So I continue.

Day 3,801. A party came to fight me. They were not the king's men. They did not know my name. I fought them. They respected the fight. This is, in the end, all I have asked for. I remain at my post. I do not know where else to be.
